_comment: OpenObserve dashboard for the Grove status page.
_lineage: Consumed by scripts/setup-monitoring.py which POSTs to OpenObserve's /api/{org}/dashboards endpoint. Renders at http://localhost:5080/web/dashboards/<dashboard_id> once provisioned.
_public_access: OpenObserve's built-in public-share feature is enabled per-panel. The 'Grove Status' dashboard is the canonical surface; eventual status.gatheringatthegrove.com (M2+) reverse-proxies to this dashboard's public-share URL. Branding deferred to a follow-up.

dashboards.name: Grove Status
dashboards.description: Public uptime + latency at-a-glance across all 4 frontends, Odoo backend, 3 Ghost CMS instances, and Postgres TCP. Read-only sharing enabled per-panel for the eventual public status page.

panels.title: Hub uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'hub-root' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Goldberry uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'goldberry-root' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: GGG uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'ggg-root' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Nursery uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 299)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'nursery-root' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Odoo uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code IN (200, 303))) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'odoo-health' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Ghost (Goldberry) uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code IN (200, 401))) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'ghost-goldberry-admin' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Ghost (GGG) uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code IN (200, 401))) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'ghost-ggg-admin' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Ghost (Nursery) uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code IN (200, 401))) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'ghost-nursery-admin' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Postgres TCP uptime (24h)
panels.query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tcp_connected)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS uptime_pct FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'postgres-tcp' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Frontend p95 response time (ms)
panels.query: SELECT percentile_cont(duration_ms, 0.95) AS p95, monitor_name FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name IN ('hub-root', 'goldberry-root', 'ggg-root', 'nursery-root') AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY monitor_name, time_bucket('1 minute', _timestamp)

panels.title: Odoo p95 response time (ms)
panels.query: SELECT percentile_cont(duration_ms, 0.95) AS p95 FROM synthetic_results WHERE monitor_name = 'odoo-health' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY time_bucket('1 minute', _timestamp)

dashboards.name: Grove CostOps
dashboards.description: DigitalOcean spend + utilization at a glance (spec §6). Spend overview + a by-cost resource table (trim candidates by spend), and a Rightsizing row that correlates droplet cost (cost-bridge) with droplet/container utilization (USE metrics from the OTel Collector, §3): high cost + low utilization = a downsize candidate. A single computed cost×utilization JOIN is a follow-up once the metric stream/field names are confirmed live.
dashboards._query_note: Cost queries target cost/do_billing_bridge.py streams (value + attrs env/type/name/size); USE queries target the OTel Collector streams (system_cpu_utilization, container_cpu_utilization, container_memory_percent, tag container_name). Exact OpenObserve OTLP column names are pending live validation — adjust after the first COST_BRIDGE_ENABLED=true + otel-collector run.

panels.title: Month-to-date spend ($)
panels.query: SELECT value AS mtd FROM cost_account_month_to_date ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Account balance ($)
panels.query: SELECT value AS balance FROM cost_account_balance ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Estimated total ($/mo)
panels.query: SELECT SUM(value) AS total FROM cost_resource_monthly_estimate WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes'

panels.title: Month-to-date spend trend
panels.query: SELECT value AS mtd, _timestamp FROM cost_account_month_to_date WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

rows.title: Cost by resource (trim candidates — highest spend first)

panels.title: Estimated monthly cost by resource
panels.query: SELECT name, type, size, value AS monthly_usd FROM cost_resource_monthly_estimate WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes' ORDER BY value DESC

rows.title: Rightsizing (cost × utilization) — high cost + low use = downsize

panels.title: Droplet monthly cost ($)
panels.query: SELECT SUM(value) AS droplet_cost FROM cost_resource_monthly_estimate WHERE type = 'droplet' AND _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes'

panels.title: Droplet CPU utilization (last 6h)
panels.query: SELECT avg(value) AS cpu, _timestamp FROM system_cpu_utilization WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY time_bucket('5 minutes', _timestamp)

panels.title: Container CPU % by container (last 6h)
panels.query: SELECT avg(value) AS cpu, container_name, _timestamp FROM container_cpu_utilization WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY container_name, time_bucket('5 minutes', _timestamp)

panels.title: Container memory % of limit (last 6h)
panels.query: SELECT avg(value) AS mem, container_name, _timestamp FROM container_memory_percent WHERE _timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY container_name, time_bucket('5 minutes', _timestamp)
